summary: Frontend-only static site testing for Yuj Studio landing page. All 21 acceptance criteria from the review request pass. Verified DOM presence of every requested data-testid, hero content and program chips, CTA smooth-scrolling to correct anchors, sticky nav glassmorphism after scroll, all 6 nav links, 9 program cards including 'Coming Soon' on kids, 3 feature cards, 8 why-choose cards, 9 gallery images loaded (naturalWidth > 0), 2 founder cards with bios, correct Location details + Google Maps iframe + Open in Maps href, 5 contact tiles with correct href prefixes (wa.me/, tel:, mailto:, instagram.com, facebook.com), footer wa.me CTA, signature line absolutely positioned inside main, marquee present, no horizontal overflow at 1440/1024/768/375 widths, and mobile drawer opens/closes properly and scrolls on link click. No JS console errors during load + scroll (one benign Lenis positioning warning about scroll offset, not an error).
action_items: OPTIONAL: Mobile drawer <a> links lack data-testid attributes (e.g., yuj-nav-link-programs). They work via href='#programs', but adding testids would improve testability. Currently the desktop nav (yuj-nav-link-*) IDs still exist in the DOM (hidden lg:flex), so link testids ARE queryable, just not the mobile drawer copies.
critical_code_review_comments: Nav.jsx: mobile drawer duplicates link markup without applying YUJ.navLink(l.id) testids on the drawer anchors. Non-blocking but a testability gap.

One benign console warning from Lenis: 'Please ensure that the container has a non-static position...'. Main container <main> already has class 'relative', so this appears to be Lenis initialization noise; safe to ignore.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static landing site at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All yuj-* data-testids present and validated. Smooth-scroll verified by scrollY delta + getBoundingClientRect top for target sections. Mobile drawer testids exist only on the button (yuj-nav-menu-button) and container (yuj-mobile-drawer); use anchor href selectors (e.g., a[href='#programs']) for internal drawer links.
